description: Performance comparison between VWAP filter enabled vs disabled
notes: VWAP filter was filtering trades based on price position relative to VWAP
Filter logic: price > VWAP + 0.5% → SHORT only; price < VWAP - 0.5% → LONG only
Starting 2026-03-10T15:00 UTC: Filter disabled to allow ALL trades for comparison
Both LONG and SHORT signals are now allowed regardless of VWAP position

baseline_performance.note: VWAP filter was active during this period

test_performance.note: All trades allowed - tracking performance for comparison
